# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Fix a tiny wording typo with no operational consequence.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The edit is tiny and has no meaningful review or operational consequence, so a full change protocol is unnecessary.
## Expected object
A deflection that treats the edit as a simple local fix rather than a scoped change workflow.
## Boundary notes
Do not over-formalize trivial wording changes. If the task is risky or needs preview, use a different skill.
## Verification hooks
The response should not invent rollback planning or explicit validation when the change is obviously trivial.
